title: IterationAssignmentPayload
description: Loop Controller's instruction for one iteration. The worker starts from a FRESH context and reads the ledger; it does not carry conversational state across iterations.

ledger_ref.description: Pointer to the loop ledger in loops/; the source of truth the worker reconstructs context from each pass.

goal.description: The single next increment for this iteration.

fresh_context.description: Always true: the worker MUST rebuild context from the ledger and never carry conversational state across iterations (the Ralph pattern). Encoded as a required const so a non-fresh-context iteration cannot be expressed.
